28000.name: Entrance to the Garden
28000.description: This is the entrance to what was once a beautiful, formal garden. Time has not been kind however, and the garden has become overgrown and wild. What were once tidy, cobbled paths have been reduced to narrow, gloomy tracks where animals roam and thorned branches reach to grasp you. Paths lead to the east and west.

28001.name: Garden Path
28001.description: Rank weeds have taken root in the cracks between the cobble stones; your feet make a swishing sound as you pass through. You can see a small courtyard to the south and the garden entrance to the east. A graceful willow tree stands here, its trailing branches swaying gently.

28002.name: Garden Path
28002.description: The trail is narrow and gloomy here and the cobblestones are uneven beneath your feet. Hedgerows press in on you to the north and east. To the south you can see a small courtyard, the garden entrance is to the west.

28003.name: West Courtyard
28003.description: At one time, lovers must have taken a rest from their strollings in this secluded court. Small stone benches are tucked discreetly behind bushes at the court's edge. The sweet smell of roses comes from the east. Garden paths lead off to the north and south.

28004.name: Rose Garden
28004.description: The air is fragrant with the smell of roses. Though the garden has been untended for many years, the hardy descendants of the garden's once pampered flora still display their blooms in a riotous display of color. The roses form walls to the north and south, the way leads east and west.

28005.name: Rose Plaza
28005.description: The center of this square is occupied by a pedestal on which rests a small statue of a single rose. Though the statue is weathered, you can still see the intricacy of its workmanship. Rose lined paths lead east and west. To the south, a dim, gloomy maze of hedges begins.

28006.name: Rose Garden
28006.description: The carefully manicured roses that once grew here have been replaced by a tougher variety sporting longer, sharper thorns. They still have great beauty though and their heady scent fills the air.

28007.name: East Courtyard
28007.description: This courtyard was once a cheerful, tidy place but brambles and crawling vines have covered nearly everything, enmeshing the court in a leafy embrace. Garden paths lead north and south. From the west you smell the sweet scent of roses. A graceful willow tree stands here, its trailing branches swaying gently.

28008.name: Creeping Death
28008.description: The plants here have a sickly, twisted look to them as if they were suffering from the effects of some noxious toxin. As you look down the trail to the south you can see that the condition not only persists, it worsens. To the north is a small court where the plants appear healthy.

28009.name: Desolate Path
28009.description: The plants here are not merely sickly; they are dead or dying. Their twisted, brittle remains crumble under your weight as you step upon them. The soft crunching of your footsteps sounds like forlorn cries of despair. The foliage looks a little better to the north, worse to the east.

28010.name: Dead Zone
28010.description: All the plants are dead here, and long dead by the looks of it. The desolation continues to the south and west.

28011.name: Dead Zone
28011.description: The desolation here is complete. The ground is bare of any traces of old life; as if it never bore life. The stark emptiness continues to the north and south. The moist smell of growing plants comes from the east and a high wall of rock prevents travel to the west.

28012.name: Dead Zone
28012.description: The earth is bare of life here. It is as if it has been leeched out to feed some unspeakable hunger. The trail climbs the side of a barren hill to the west, the desolation continues to the north.

28013.name: Hillside
28013.description: The hill trail rises to the south and descends to the east. To the north and west the hill is covered by large jagged rocks which make passage impossible. The land has a dead, barren look to the east, but to the south you see grasses growing on the hilltop.

28014.name: Hilltop
28014.description: You have climbed to the top of a hill which overlooks the garden to the east. The hill slopes down to a desolate region to the north and toward some swampy ground and a pond to the south.

28015.name: Bottom of a Hill
28015.description: The ground is swampy here. To the west the swampiness increases until the water forms a small pond. A track through the reeds heads off to the south and a hill rises to the north.

28016.name: Swampy Ground
28016.description: You can hear small splashes from behind an intervening stand of willows to your west. The marshy ground persists to the north and south.

28017.name: Shallow Pond
28017.description: You are splashing through a shallow pond that stretches away to the south. Thick reeds surround you on the north and west and to the east you can see what looks to be the foot of a low hill.

28018.name: Mazeway South
28018.description: You stand beneath a wrought iron arch which straddles the trail here. The iron is the red-brown color of rust though there are patches that look as if they bear traces of white paint. A narrow track leads off between tall hedges to the north; to the south you see a wide garden path. Parkway Intersection

28019.name: Shallow Pond
28019.description: The water rises only to your knees so you have no fear of drowning. The pond continues to the north but to the east the land is dryer but still marshy. Dense thickets of reeds and cattails enclose you on the south and west.

28020.name: Swampy Ground
28020.description: Small flies are an annoying presence as you negotiate this wet, boggy trail. You can see more swampland to the north and a small pond to the west. A wide garden path heads off to the east.

28021.name: Garden Parkway
28021.description: You stand on a wide garden trail that runs to the east and west. The ground appears to grow marshy to the west, while to the east the trail is dry and comfortable looking. Walls of foliage prevent passage to the north and south.

28022.name: Parkway Intersection
28022.description: A connecting trail heads off to the north and you can see that it passes beneath a rust colored arch in the distance. Wide garden trails also lead off to the east and west.

28023.name: Garden Trail
28023.description: You stand on a narrow garden trail which continues to the north and south. To the north you can see a small courtyard and at a distance to the south you notice that the trail makes an abrupt turn to the west.

28024.name: Garden Parkway
28024.description: The grass is short here as if it has been eaten down by animals. The trail continues off toward the east and west. You see trail intersections in both directions.

28025.name: Small Clearing
28025.description: You have come to a small clearing. The grass is knee-high and very thick. Wide, grassy trails lead off to the north and west. To the east, you can see flashes of white and grey peeking from behind the intervening foliage.

28026.name: Statuary Garden
28026.description: You stand at the southern end of a large clearing which is filled with statues. They seem to follow your every move with empty eyes.

28027.name: Bend in the Trail
28027.description: You stand at a bend in the trail. To your west you can see a wide cobbled path heading off to the south. Another garden path makes its way to the north from here.

28028.name: Statuary Garden
28028.description: Statues, carved from white and grey stone, surround you on every side. Some of them look very old and are extremely weathered. Others seem to be newer as the detail stands out a bit more crisply on them. A path offers exit to the west and the garden continues to the south.

28029.name: Grassy Trail
28029.description: You stand in the center of a north and south running trail. To your south the trail terminates in a small clearing while the trail continues to the north.

28030.name: Grassy Trail
28030.description: You have come to a small intersection. From here you see a wide trail leading north and south. To the east you see large, white and grey figures standing out sharply against the distant green of plant life.

28031.name: Grassy Trail
28031.description: You stand at the northern end of a grassy trail that stretches off to the south. Directly to your north is a abandoned shack with a large rent in the side beckoning you.

28032.name: Ruined Shack
28032.description: This evidently used to be a gardener's supply shed. The bare walls are lined with hooks and pegs which had evidently once been used to hold gardening tools. The doorway is to the west but a large hole in the south wall offers egress in that direction.

28033.name: Promenade
28033.description: From here you can see the Promenade stretching away to the north. A doorway to your east offers entrance to a tumble-down shack. Dense foliage prevents passage to the south and west.

28034.name: Promenade
28034.description: The Promenade is intersected here by another trail that makes its way toward some tall hedges to the west. The Promenade itself continues to the north and south.

28035.name: Promenade
28035.description: From here you can see the cobbled Promenade extending to the south. To the east you see another, smaller garden trail marching off to the north. A leafy plant with thick stems grows here, its roots bulging from the soil.

28036.name: In the Maze
28036.description: You stand on a cobbled path somewhere within the garden maze. The walls of the maze are formed by tall hedges which are adorned with sharp thorns. The air is moist and rich with the smell of growing things.

28037.name: In the Maze
28037.description: You stand on a cobbled path somewhere within the garden maze. The walls of the maze are formed by tall hedges which are adorned with sharp thorns. The air is moist and rich with the smell of growing things.

28038.description: You stand on a cobbled path somewhere within the garden maze. The walls of the maze are formed by tall hedges which are adorned with sharp thorns. The air is moist and rich with the smell of growing things.

28040.description: You stand on a cobbled path somewhere within the garden maze. The walls of the maze are formed by tall hedges which are adorned with sharp thorns. The air is moist and rich with the smell of growing things.

28046.name: Mazeway North
28046.description: You stand on a small north and south running path. To your north is a small square filled with roses. To the south, large hedges block your view. Rose Plaza

28047.name: In the Maze
28047.description: You stand on a cobbled path somewhere within the garden maze. The walls of the maze are formed by tall hedges which are adorned with sharp thorns. The air is moist and rich with the smell of growing things. Mazeway North

28050.name: In the Maze
28050.description: You stand on a cobbled path somewhere within the garden maze. The walls of the maze are formed by tall hedges which are adorned with sharp thorns. The air is moist and rich with the smell of growing things. You are very thirsty and should find something to drink. In the Maze

28051.name: In the Maze
28051.description: You stand on a cobbled path somewhere within the garden maze. The walls of the maze are formed by tall hedges which are adorned with sharp thorns. The air is moist and rich with the smell of growing things. In the Maze

28054.description: You stand on a cobbled path somewhere within the garden maze. The walls of the maze are formed by tall hedges which are adorned with sharp thorns. The air is moist and rich with the smell of growing things. In the Maze

28055.name: In the Maze
28055.description: You stand on a cobbled path somewhere within the garden maze. The walls of the maze are formed by tall hedges which are adorned with sharp thorns. The air is moist and rich with the smell of growing things. In the Maze

28056.name: Mazeway West
28056.description: The earth is bare here, but lacks the dull, desolate look of death that you can see to the west. To the east is a narrow corridor formed by living hedges. It is as if the sickness that has devastated the earth to the west can not penetrate any further to the east.

28057.name: In the Maze
28057.description: You stand on a cobbled path somewhere within the garden maze. The walls of the maze are formed by tall hedges which are adorned with sharp thorns. The air is moist and rich with the smell of growing things.

28086.name: Mazeway East

w.to_room_name: Pool in the Center of the Maze

28099.name: Pool in the Center of the Maze
28099.description: You stand at the very center of the maze. There is a small, clear pond here with a few lily pads floating on its surface. You can see exits to the north, south east and west leading back into the maze. In the Maze
